case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY BILL HALL BAIL BONDS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
